## Hello! 
> I'm a CS student and loves pretty much every thing related to tech. I have a deep bond with computers since my childhood, I started with Pentium G2020 paired with 4gigs of DDR3 ram Sounds Great! I am currently learning C/C++ for DSA and flask. I have planned to create my 1st big project later this year for my portfolio and Learning purpose.
